text:
Kenyan race-walking veteran Samuel Gathimba believes he has what it takes to win a medal at the 2024 Paris Olympic Games slated for July 26-August 11 in France.The 2019 African champion will set his foot on the streets on the morning of August 1 as he aims to leave a mark on the games.Get Full Access for Ksh299/WeekUncover the stories others won’t tell. title: Paris Olympics 2024: Race-walking veteran Gathimba going for glory in Paris
author: Rodgers Eshitemi
description: After finishing fourth in the 2023 world championships held in Budapest Hungary, is confident of making it to the podium.
